hypothesis: Radical simplification: only two reward signals — gate_in_view (face the gate) and progress (move toward it). No survive, altitude, RPY, speed, gate bonus, or proximity. Always spawn mid-air at random gates (no takeoff needed). This eliminates the hover trap entirely since there is zero reward for staying still. The drone MUST face and approach gates to get any reward. Training from scratch (no pretrained checkpoint) since old policies are completely misaligned. gate_in_view_coef=1.0 gives 0-1/step for alignment. progress_coef=50 gives ~0.5/step at 0.01m/step approach speed. Two balanced, complementary signals.
